finderPanel.title: Help me get back to my family
finderPanel.description: A quick WhatsApp message can help reunite this pet with the people who love them.
finderPanel.sendLocationBtn: Send my location to my family
finderPanel.waNotAvailable: WhatsApp contact is not available right now.
finderPanel.waTemplateBasic: Hi, I found {{petName}}. I wanted to reach out right away in case this helps bring {{petName}} back home safely.
finderPanel.waTemplateFallback: Hi, I found {{petName}}!. My phone couldn't get an automatic map link, please let me know when you see this!
finderPanel.waTemplateLocation:
Hi, I found {{petName}}. I wanted to share the exact location where I found him/her to help bring {{petName}} back home safely. I hope this helps you reunite very soon. 

Google Maps: {{url}}

finderCard.title: Did you find {{petName}}?
finderCard.description: Thank you for looking out. Use the options below to safely notify the owner without exposing private information.
finderCard.msgPlaceholder: Tell the owner where you found the pet...
finderCard.defaultMsg: Hi, I found {{petName}} and wanted to report their location.
finderCard.locPlaceholder: Optional address or Google Maps link
finderCard.errNoLocation: Location is not available in this browser.
finderCard.errLocDenied: We could not access your location. You can type it manually.
finderCard.errEmptyMsg: Please write a short message before sending.
finderCard.success: Your message was sent to the owner.

auth.resetSent: We have sent password reset instructions to your email.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to manage your pets.
auth.passMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

updatePassword.title: Update Password
updatePassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
updatePassword.setSubtitle: Enter your new secure password below to regain access to your dashboard.

hero.description: Keep each profile complete and ready to help your companion get back home faster when it matters most.

pets.description: Every profile here helps tell your pet’s story. Update details, open the public profile, or turn on Lost Mode when your companion needs more visibility.

empty.title: Your gallery is waiting.
empty.description: Add your first pet and create a profile that helps them come home safely.

petCard.photoNoteText: This photo becomes your pet’s identity. Make sure the face is fully visible and centered within the circle. A front-facing image works best. If the face isn’t clear or complete, please choose another photo. High-quality images ensure a sharper, more precise engraving.

editor.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Friendly, playful, and loves being around people.
editor.allergiesPlaceholder: e.g. Allergic to chicken. Takes medication every morning.

owner.description: Make sure your information is accurate so your pet’s profile can help the right person reach you quickly when needed.
owner.phoneHint: Used for WhatsApp messages and shared location.

alerts.imageTooLarge: Image must be 10 MB or smaller.
alerts.petSaveBanner: Your pet profile has been updated.
